TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Cihafayan, title = Cihafayan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cihafayan} }

S.FORM: == Cihafayan == Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Fungrincn ka alang Cihafayan. 101 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 221 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 183 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 38 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pusu nniqan alang Chihavaian, dungus na o "tnkuyan masu". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki Fungrin cng alang Sansingri. Gasuc Mniq hngari bi hraan hidaw Fungrin cng, gaga daya hari alang Sansingri hiya. Tiri lnglingay Sttu. Pgkla patas cyawtung Mgrig rulu: Taypey>kwotaw 1 haw>kwotaw 3 haw>Kwotaw 3 cya lutuc Taypey >elug wunsan>syeyn106>syeyn109>Peyyi kungru>Pinhay kungru>suhwa kungru>hwatung cungku dungru>elug cungsan>hwa39>hwa38-1>paru hakaw Mican>syeyn195>elug sansing>elug wunsan>Dhuq Klgan sjiqan nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang Tmhangan dha "Cawbi " uri ka alang Cihafayan, seejiq Amis o tmhangan "Chihavaian" ksun, dungus na o "tnkuyan masu". Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pgkla patas saan rmigaw klwaan kmlawa sapah Fungrin cng. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == ¶ińßa*ajan == gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn *uŇč…ĺin ¶n ka alaŇč ¶ińßa*ajan. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis **%, t…ĺuku *%, tajal *%, bunun *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŇč ¶ńßińßa*aian, duŇčus na o "tnkujan masu". nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki *uŇč…ĺin ¶Ňč alaŇč sansiŇč…ĺi. gasu ¶ mniq ńßŇča…ĺi bi ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw *uŇč…ĺin ¶Ňč, gaga daja ńßa…ĺi alaŇč sansiŇč…ĺi ńßija. ti…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj sttu. pgkla patas ¶jawtuŇč mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>kwotaw * ńßaw>kwotaw * ńßaw>kwotaw * ¶ja lutu ¶ tajp…ô >…ôlug wunsan>sj…ôn***>sj…ôn***>p…ôji kuŇč…ĺu>pinńßaj kuŇč…ĺu>suńßwa kuŇč…ĺu>ńßwatuŇč ¶uŇčku duŇč…ĺu>…ôlug ¶uŇčsan>ńßwa**>ńßwa**-*>pa…ĺu ńßakaw mi ¶an>sj…ôn***>…ôlug sansiŇč>…ôlug wunsan>dńßuq klgan s…üiqan n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. snńßijun ¶uŇč ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw. pnaańß alaŇč tmńßaŇčan dńßa " ¶awbi " u…ĺi ka alaŇč ¶ińßa*ajan, s…ô…ô…üiq amis o tmńßaŇčan " ¶ńßińßa*aian" ksun, duŇčus na o "tnkujan masu". pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw klwaan kmlawa sapańß *uŇč…ĺin ¶Ňč. pnjańßan pnatas
S.FORM: == Cihafayan == Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Fungrincn ka alang Cihafayan. 101 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 221 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 83% niqan 183 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 17% niqan 38 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Amis 77%, Truku 1%, Tayal 2%, Bunun 1%, ni rahuq na o 1%. Pusu nniqan alang Chihavaian, dungus na o "tnkuyan masu". Nniqan alang Nyusan Skanki Fungrin cng alang Sansingri. Gasuc Mniq hngari bi hraan hidaw Fungrin cng, gaga daya hari alang Sansingri hiya. Tiri lnglingay Sttu. Pgkla patas cyawtung Mgrig rulu: Taypey>kwotaw 1 haw>kwotaw 3 haw>Kwotaw 3 cya lutuc Taypey >elug wunsan>syeyn106>syeyn109>Peyyi kungru>Pinhay kungru>suhwa kungru>hwatung cungku dungru>elug cungsan>hwa39>hwa38-1>paru hakaw Mican>syeyn195>elug sansing>elug wunsan>Dhuq Klgan sjiqan nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeyncucyaw. Pnaah alang Tmhangan dha "Cawbi " uri ka alang Cihafayan, seejiq Amis o tmhangan "Chihavaian" ksun, dungus na o "tnkuyan masu". Pgkla patas saan rmigaw Pgkla patas saan rmigaw klwaan kmlawa sapah Fungrin cng. Pnyahan pnatas
S.PHON: == ¶ińßa*ajan == gaga mniq ńßwa…ĺ…ôs…ôn *uŇč…ĺin ¶n ka alaŇč ¶ińßa*ajan. *** sapańß ka kn…ô…ôgu na sapańß, *** ńßiji ka kana knńßb…ĺagan na ńßiji. tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan *** ńßiji sp, …ĺańßuq na uxaj tnpusu s…ô…ô…üiq o maŇčal **% niqan ** ńßiji koia. kana ka kl…ô…ôgan s…ô…ô…üiq ga, amis **%, t…ĺuku *%, tajal *%, bunun *%, ni …ĺańßuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŇč ¶ńßińßa*aian, duŇčus na o "tnkujan masu". nniqan alaŇč njusan skanki *uŇč…ĺin ¶Ňč alaŇč sansiŇč…ĺi. gasu ¶ mniq ńßŇča…ĺi bi ńß…ĺaan ńßidaw *uŇč…ĺin ¶Ňč, gaga daja ńßa…ĺi alaŇč sansiŇč…ĺi ńßija. ti…ĺi lŇčliŇčaj sttu. pgkla patas ¶jawtuŇč mg…ĺig …ĺulu: tajp…ô>kwotaw * ńßaw>kwotaw * ńßaw>kwotaw * ¶ja lutu ¶ tajp…ô >…ôlug wunsan>sj…ôn***>sj…ôn***>p…ôji kuŇč…ĺu>pinńßaj kuŇč…ĺu>suńßwa kuŇč…ĺu>ńßwatuŇč ¶uŇčku duŇč…ĺu>…ôlug ¶uŇčsan>ńßwa**>ńßwa**-*>pa…ĺu ńßakaw mi ¶an>sj…ôn***>…ôlug sansiŇč>…ôlug wunsan>dńßuq klgan s…üiqan n…ôalaŇč amis. d…üijun ka…ĺi ka…ĺi amis ni tlu. snńßijun ¶uŇč ¶jaw pn…ĺńßulan …üo…ĺo ni t…ô…ôn ¶u ¶jaw. pnaańß alaŇč tmńßaŇčan dńßa " ¶awbi " u…ĺi ka alaŇč ¶ińßa*ajan, s…ô…ô…üiq amis o tmńßaŇčan " ¶ńßińßa*aian" ksun, duŇčus na o "tnkujan masu". pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw pgkla patas saan …ĺmigaw klwaan kmlawa sapańß *uŇč…ĺin ¶Ňč. pnjańßan pnatas
